ATTN CHARTERING DESK

GOOD DAY

MV MAPLE FORTUNE/ 2010BLT/32K- OPEN MUNDRA, INDIA O/A 19-21 NOV 2025
-BOD TO BE ABT VLSFO 700 MT AND ABT LSMGO 75 MT

M/V MAPLE FORTUNE
HK FLAG 2010BLT SDBC, LOG FITTED

GRT / NRT 20,867/11,821
LOA 179.61M     BEAM  28.40M
TPC:45.95
5H/5H   4X30T SWL CRANES
GRAIN / BALE:  42,500 CBM/ 40,375CBM
TANKTOP/DECK/H.COVER STRENGTH:
HOLD TANK TOP: 20.0 MT/SQM

HATCH COVER: 3.3 MT/SQM

SPEED AND CONSUMPTION:
LADEN ABT 12.0 KTS ON FO/18 MT + LSMGO/0.1 MT DAILY

IDLE : FO/ 2.7 MT + LSMGO/ 0.1 MT
WORKING : FO/ 4.5 MT + LSMGO/ 0.1 MT

ADA

Yashaswini Nayak | Voyage Desk
